debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
label : α
l : LabelledTree α
h : IsOrdered α inst✝ l
⊢ fastCheckMem α inst✝ label l = true ↔ label ∈ l

proof:
induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, Membership.mem, beq_iff_eq]
  | node v left right ih_l ih_r =>
    rw [fastCheckMem]
    split_ifs with h_eq h_lt
    · simp [beq_iff_eq] at h_eq
      subst h_eq
      simp [LabelledTree.mem, Membership.mem]
      exact h.2.2.2.2
    · rw [ih_l h.2.2.1]
      simp [LabelledTree.mem, Membership.mem]
      intro hr
      exact (not_le_of_gt h_lt (h.2.1 label hr)).elim
    · rw [ih_r h.2.2.2.1]
      simp [LabelledTree.mem, Membership.mem]
      intro hl
      have h_ne : v ≠ label := by simpa [beq_iff_eq] using h_eq
      have h_v_lt : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt h_lt) h_ne
      exact (not_le_of_gt h_v_lt (h.1 label hl)).elim
successful_attempts:
induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, Membership.mem, beq_iff_eq]
  | node v left right ih_l ih_r =>
    rw [fastCheckMem]
    split_ifs with h_eq h_lt
    · simp [beq_iff_eq] at h_eq
      subst h_eq
      simp [LabelledTree.mem, Membership.mem]
      exact h.2.2.2.2
    · rw [ih_l h.2.2.1]
      simp [LabelledTree.mem, Membership.mem]
      intro hr
      exact (not_le_of_gt h_lt (h.2.1 label hr)).elim
    · rw [ih_r h.2.2.2.1]
      simp [LabelledTree.mem, Membership.mem]
      intro hl
      have h_ne : v ≠ label := by simpa [beq_iff_eq] using h_eq
      have h_v_lt : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt h_lt) h_ne
      exact (not_le_of_gt h_v_lt (h.1 label hl)).elim
